name: Bayli
blurb: Runs the floor with precision and zero ego. Sets the standard every chair aims for.

name: Jarred
blurb: Fade obsessive. The kind of barber who won't let you leave until every line is right.

name: Ben
blurb: Solid hands, clean work. Keeps his chair full and his clients coming back.

name: Locky
blurb: Coming up through the Blacksmith Academy. Learning the craft the right way — real chairs, real clients.

name: Jayden
blurb: Academy-trained, building his skills under the Blacksmith roof. Gets better every week.

name: Sammi
blurb: Runs Blackrose. From foils to precision cuts — the salon side of the Blacksmith world.

name: Cameron
photoSource: blacksmithbarbers.com.au (academy.webp — may not be a headshot, verify)
blurb: Founded the shop in 2015. Twenty years behind the chair. Built Blacksmith from one room to a Gold Coast institution.

name: Mubarak
blurb: Steady hands and clean technique. Part of the Blacksmith crew.
